parameters.query: SELECT brand_voice, niche, tone, writing_style FROM user_ai_config WHERE user_id = '{{ $json.body.user_id }}' LIMIT 1
SELECT system_prompt FROM operator_prompts WHERE component = 'social_subagent' LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO content_outputs (user_id, type, payload, created_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.user_id }}',
  'social_{{ $json.platform }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ platform: $json.platform, post_text: $json.post_text, hashtags: $json.hashtags, suggested_image_prompt: $json.suggested_image_prompt, char_count: $json.char_count }) }}'::jsonb,
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id
